Hero.name: ZAID MARIAM
Hero.description: I build modern, scalable, and high-performance web applications using React, Laravel, and MySQL. I focus on clean architecture, responsive design, and creating exceptional user experiences.

About.description: I'm Zaid Mariam, a Full Stack Web Developer from Tiznit, Morocco. I studied Digital Development – Full Stack Web at OFPPT. I enjoy building modern, scalable, and high-performance web applications that combine elegant UI, clean architecture, and exceptional user experiences. I'm passionate about learning new technologies, solving complex problems, and transforming ideas into digital products that people love.

journey.title: My Journey
journey.subtitle: Chronological milestones from learning to real-world products

m1.title: Started My Programming Journey
m1.desc: Began learning the fundamentals of web development and built my first projects using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP, and MySQL. This period helped me develop strong problem-solving skills and a solid understanding of modern web development.

m2.title: Specialized in Full Stack Web Development
m2.desc: Enrolled in the Full Stack Web Development program at OFPPT, where I started building modern, scalable web applications using React, Next.js, Laravel, Tailwind CSS, and other modern technologies.

m3.title: Final Year Project – E-Commerce Platform
m3.desc: Designed and developed a complete e-commerce platform as my graduation project, featuring user authentication, product management, shopping cart, order processing, and an admin dashboard using a modern full-stack architecture.

m4.title: Building Real-World Projects
m4.desc: Continuously developing modern full-stack web applications, improving my expertise with React, Next.js, Laravel, and exploring new technologies through personal and real-world projects.

Skills.description: A carefully selected ecosystem of modern technologies I use to build fast, scalable and elegant web applications.

frontend.title: Frontend
frontend.description: Creating responsive, accessible, and high-performance user interfaces with modern web standards.

backend.title: Backend
backend.description: Building secure, modular APIs and scalable, performant server architecture and services.

database.title: Database
database.description: Designing structured schema patterns and managing secure databases optimized for speed.

tools.title: Tools
tools.description: Ecosystem tools, version control systems, and workflows that accelerate shipping clean software.

Projects.description: A curated portfolio of high-end SaaS applications, developer tooling, and decentralized web products I have built from design to implementation.

codelyx.title: CodeLyx Digital Solutions
codelyx.description: A modern showcase platform for CodeLyx, featuring professional web development services, custom digital solutions, responsive design, interactive sections, and a premium user experience to present expertise and attract clients.

cosmea.title: Cosméa E-Commerce Platform
cosmea.description: A full-stack e-commerce platform for cosmetic products featuring secure authentication, product search, shopping cart, customer reviews, order management, and a comprehensive admin dashboard with CRUD operations.

Contact.description: Have a project idea, freelance opportunity, or just want to say hello? I'm always open to discussing new ideas and building modern web experiences together.
Contact.successText: Thank you! I'll get back to you soon.
Contact.msgReceived: Thank you. Your message has been received. I'll get back to you shortly.

Footer.description: I build modern, scalable and high-performance web applications focused on exceptional user experiences.
